testcase.name: T-API-1 - Verify that Check GET /api/sales endpoint with Admin token
T-API-2 - Verify that Test POST /api/sales/plant/{plantId} (Happy path)
T-API-3 - Verify that Test POST /api/sales/plant/{plantId} with quantity 0
T-API-4 - Verify that Check GET /api/sales/{id} endpoint
T-API-5 - Verify that Check DELETE /api/sales/{id} endpoint
T-API-6 - Verify that Check GET /api/sales with normal user token
T-API-7 - Verify that Check GET /api/sales/page with pagination
T-API-8 - Verify that Check GET /api/sales/{id} with normal user token
T-API-9 - Verify that Test 403 Forbidden on POST
